case_title: WONG, HELEN vs. KHAJEHGANI, BAHMAN et al

docket_entries.description: CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, HELEN AS TO DEFENDANT KHAJEHGANI, BAHMAN DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT KHAJEHGANI, BAHMAN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT KHAJEHGANI, BAHMAN
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, HELEN COURT TRIAL SET FOR DEC-20-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/PAUL S. FONG AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 438 12TH AVE S.F, CA. - STAY OF EVICTION TO 1-10-94, 5PM - RENT & DAMAGE WVD. IF DEF. VACATES BY 1-10-94 & RETURNS KEYS TO MR. FONG - IF DEF. DOESN'T VACATE DEF. MUST PAY $2,066 R&D, $750 ATTY FEES & $125 COSTS. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KHAJEHGANI, BAHMAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 438 12TH AVE, #1, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL JAN-10-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEF. DOESN'T VACATE BY 5PM, 1-10-94 & SURRENDER KEYS TO PAUL FONG AT 456 MONTGOMERY ST, #700, S.F, PL. WILL BE AWARDED $2,066 R&D, $750 ATTY FEES & $125 COSTS. WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY.

parties.name: KHAJEHGANI, BAHMAN 438 12TH AVE APT #1 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94118
